title: Implement an infrastructure repository
scenario: Infrastructure implements application ports. The application trait stays the dependency boundary.
instructions: Implement InMemoryUserRepository for the UserRepository port.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and implement InMemoryUserRepository for the UserRepository port.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Implement an infrastructure repository is shown below.

completionExplanation: Implement an infrastructure repository now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register inmemory repo. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
